title: Green Hydrogen and Ammonia Project Cancelled in Austria Due to 'Insufficient Public Funding'
content: The 60MW Green Ammonia Linz project in Austria, being developed by national power company Verbund and chemicals producer LAT Nitrogen, has been cancelled. Despite having signed a grant agreement with the European Commission for â‚¬48.5m ($56.7m) from its Innovation Fund, the developers have said in a joint statement that this was still not enough to get the project over the line to a final investment decision.
author: Analysts Account
